safety_gate.description: Fails if specific PII patterns (SSN, medical record IDs) are detected.
safety_gate.error_message: Hard Gate Failure: Potential PII detected in output.

disclaimer_check.description: Fails if exact disclaimer is missing.
disclaimer_check.error_message: Hard Gate Failure: Required legal/medical disclaimer is missing.

length_constraint.description: Alerts if response is too short or too long.
length_constraint.error_message: Warning: Appeal letter length is outside expected bounds (150-2000 words).

tool_call_validation.description: Ensures formatting of intermediate agent tools is syntactically valid JSON.
tool_call_validation.error_message: Pipeline Checkpoint Failure: Agent produced invalid JSON for tool execution.
